recommendations.title: Coal Miner's Daughter
recommendations.overview: Biography of Loretta Lynn, a country and western singer that came from poverty to fame.

recommendations.title: Nell
recommendations.overview: In a remote woodland cabin, a small town doctor discovers Nell — a beautiful young hermit woman with many secrets.

recommendations.title: Continental Divide
recommendations.overview: A hard-nosed Chicago journalist has an unlikely love affair with an eagle researcher.

recommendations.title: Amazing Grace
recommendations.overview: The true story of William Wilberforce and his courageous quest to end the British slave trade. Along the way, Wilberforce meets intense opposition, but his minister urges him to see the cause through.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader
recommendations.overview: This time around Edmund and Lucy Pevensie, along with their pesky cousin Eustace Scrubb find themselves swallowed into a painting and on to a fantastic Narnian ship headed for the very edges of the world.

recommendations.title: Chasing Mavericks
recommendations.overview: Surfer Jay Moriarity sets out to ride the Northern California break known as Mavericks.

recommendations.title: Enigma
recommendations.overview: The story of the WWII project to crack the code behind the Enigma machine, used by the Germans to encrypt messages sent to their submarines.

recommendations.title: Thunderheart
recommendations.overview: A young mixed-blood FBI agent is assigned to work with a cynical veteran investigator on a murder on a poverty-stricken Sioux reservation.

recommendations.title: Gorky Park
recommendations.overview: Police Inspector Renko tries to solve the case of three bodies found in Moscow's Gorky Park but finds his attempts to solve the crime impeded by his superiors. Working on his own, Renko seeks out more information and stumbles across a conspiracy invo

recommendations.title: Blink
